description: Measure the abdominal aorta diameter at three levels (suprarenal, infrarenal, and pre-bifurcation) on the provided CT, calculate tapering ratios, and identify any focal dilations. Save measurements markup to ~/Documents/SlicerData/AMOS/aortic_measurements.mrk.json and report to ~/Documents/SlicerData/AMOS/tapering_report.json with fields: suprarenal_diameter_mm, suprarenal_vertebral_level, infrarenal_diameter_mm, infrarenal_vertebral_level, bifurcation_diameter_mm, bifurcation_vertebral_level, infrarenal_suprarenal_ratio, bifurcation_suprarenal_ratio, focal_dilation_present, focal_dilation_max_diameter_mm, focal_dilation_location, tapering_assessment, clinical_recommendation.
